prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，与该校物理类招生专业（软件工程、机械工程、人工智能等）方向契合，可能吸引一定关注；内蒙古2026年高考报名总人数约15.4万人，较2025年（约11.6万人）大幅增加约32.5%，其中物理类考生估算约11.1万人（较2025年8.4万人增约32.5%），考生规模显著扩大加剧了本科一批竞争；宁夏大学位于宁夏银川市，属西北地区；在内蒙古属跨省招生，无本省保护性倾斜；2025年物理类招生26人，占该校在内蒙古总计划约63%，属主要招生科类。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次14495名、2026年扩招3人（+11.5%）使位次后移、以及内蒙古物理类考生大幅增加约32.5%使竞争加剧等多重因素，扩招的缓解效应不足以抵消考生大增带来的竞争压力，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年小幅后移；预测最低位次约15299名，区间14799–15799名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 15823 → 16847 → 23010 → 24417 → 14495. From 2021 to 2024, there was a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 8594 places; in 2025, due to the change of the college entrance examination model to "3+1+2" subject selection (physics category), the ranking significantly recovered to 14495, moving forward by about 9922 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of 14495. The university's enrollment plan in Inner Mongolia for science (physics category): 28 in 2021, 28 in 2022, 32 in 2023, 29 in 2024, 26 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 29, an increase of 3 students (+11.5%) compared to 2025, a moderate expansion that somewhat alleviates competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Ningxia University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it is approximately 137th (134th in 2025), with slight fluctuations in recent years but overall stable in the middle-lower segment, belonging to a regional comprehensive university; in 2022, reputation was somewhat negative (cafeteria and dormitory issues), in 2026, reputation is neutral/mixed (library management); Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 104th, with a rating of "average", and low exposure on short video platforms; no obvious signs of enrollment gaps or anomalies, overall public opinion is stable; Ningxia University has no A- or above disciplines in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, with discipline strength mainly at the B level, overall at a mid-level, with limited appeal to high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering continue to have high social popularity, aligning with the university's physics category enrollment majors (software engineering, mechanical engineering, artificial intelligence, etc.), potentially attracting some attention; the total number of college entrance examination registrants in Inner Mongolia in 2026 is about 154,000, a significant increase of about 32.5% compared to 2025 (about 116,000), with physics category candidates estimated at about 111,000 (an increase of about 32.5% from 84,000 in 2025), the substantial increase in candidate numbers intensifies competition in the first batch of undergraduate programs; Ningxia University is located in Yinchuan, Ningxia, in the northwest region; it is a cross-provincial enrollment in Inner Mongolia, with no local protective bias; in 2025, physics category enrollment was 26, accounting for about 63% of the university's total plan in Inner Mongolia, making it the main enrollment category.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 14495, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 3 students (+11.5%) causing a backward shift in ranking, and the significant increase of about 32.5% in physics category candidates in Inner Mongolia intensifying competition, the mitigating effect of the expansion is insufficient to offset the competitive pressure from the surge in candidates. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 15299, with a range of 14799–15799.
